name: Lihe Technology (Hunan) Co., Ltd.
summary: Lihe Technology (Hunan) Co., Ltd. manufactures monitoring instruments for environmental automation. The company offers automatic water quality monitoring systems, air/smoke automatic monitoring systems, emergency testing products, and automated laboratory equipment, as well as an integrated information management platform for environmental monitoring. It also provides system integration and operational services. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Changsha, China.
